settings.title: Monster Piercing | Ball Back Studs
settings.text:
Experience everyday elegance with our Ball Back Studs Collection, created for comfort, style, and versatility. Crafted from high quality materials including titanium, surgical steel, and sterling silver, each piece is designed to provide a secure fit and smooth finish for effortless wear all day long.

Our ball back studs feature a rounded back design that sits comfortably against the skin, making them ideal for cartilage, lobe, tragus, and helix piercings. Choose from plain, polished styles or stone set designs to match your individual look.

Perfect for those who love dainty, minimalist jewellery that blends modern style with practical comfort, these studs offer a timeless option for any piercing collection.

settings.question: What are ball back studs?
settings.answer: Ball back studs are a style of piercing jewellery featuring a rounded ball end instead of a flat disc. The smooth ball sits comfortably at the back of the piercing, making them ideal for ear, cartilage, and lip piercings.

settings.question: Are silver and steel ball back studs safe for sensitive skin?
settings.answer:
Yes. Our surgical steel ball back studs are
hypoallergenic and safe for most skin types. Sterling silver is suitable for healed piercings but may not be ideal for very fresh piercings, as silver can oxidise. If your piercing is new, it’s best to start with titanium or steel before switching to silver once healed.

settings.question: What piercings can ball back studs be used for?
settings.answer: Ball back studs are versatile and can be worn in a range of piercings including helix, lobe, conch, tragus, lip, and cartilage piercings. The rounded back makes them particularly comfortable for areas that may experience friction.

settings.question: Are your ball back studs externally or internally threaded?
settings.answer: Most of our ball back studs are externally threaded for a secure and classic fit. Each piece is precision-made to ensure a smooth thread that won’t irritate the piercing.
